title: euodia kavaiensis
intro: Euodia kavaiensis, also known as Kawa, is a tropical plant native to the Pacific Island region, specifically Hawaii, and is a member of the citrus family. The medicinal properties of Euodia kavaiensis are attributed to its high concentration of kawain, a lignan, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Euodia kavaiensis include relief from pain, inflammation, and anxiety, as well as improvement in cardiovascular health and potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, Euodia kavaiensis is often prepared as a tea or infused in a topical oil for its medicinal properties.
